channel.title: Swift on Yin 东亮
channel.description: Recent content in Swift on Yin 东亮

item.title: 语法
item.description: 官方文档 # 官方文档：The Swift Programming Language https://developer.apple.com/documentation/swift 语言特点 # https://www.swift.org/about/ Swift is a general-purpose programming language that’s approachable for newcomers and powerful for experts. It is fast, modern, safe, and a joy to write. 变量声明 # swift 使用 let 来声明常量，使用 var 来声明变量。常量只能赋值一次。即：let 的内存地址不能变，v

item.title: 官方示例
item.description: 官方教程 # SwiftUI Tutorials https://developer.apple.com/tutorials/swiftui/ Landmarks SwiftUI essentials Views Lists and navigation Handling user input Drawing and animation App design and layout Framework intergration UIKit watchOS macOS SwiftUI Concepts Tutorial https://developer.apple.com/tutorials/swiftui-concepts Simple Apps Tutorials https://developer.apple.com/tutorials/sample-apps Develop apps for Apple platforms https://developer.apple.com/tutorials/app-dev-training Develop in Swift Tutorials https://developer.apple.com/tutorials/develop-in-swift Sample Code # 模块 项目名称 关联文档 SwiftUI WritingApp Building a document-based app with SwiftUI SwiftData SwiftDataFlashCardSample Building a document-based app using SwiftData CoreData / SwiftData SampleTrips Adopting SwiftData for a Core Data app CoreData CoreDataCloudKitShare Sharing Core Data objects between iCloud users CloudKit https://github.com/apple?q=cloudkit-sample&type=repository

item.title: SwiftUI 对数据流与状态的管理
item.description: 1. @State 和 @Binding # https://developer.apple.com/documentation/swiftui/state @State 是 SwiftUI 中用于声明本地状态变量的属性包装器。任何使用到 @State 变量的视图，当该变量变化时，都会重新渲染。 import SwiftUI struct ContentView: View { @State private var counter = 0 var body: some View { VStack { Text("Counter: \(counter)") Button(action: { counter += 1 }) { Text("Increment Counter") } } } } @Binding 用于在不同视图之间传递

item.title: SwiftData
item.description: SwiftData makes it easy to persist data using declarative code. You can query and filter data using regular Swift code. And it’s designed to integrate seamlessly with SwiftUI. Related docs： https://developer.apple.com/xcode/swiftdata/ https://developer.apple.com/documentation/swiftdata Preserving # Model # @Model import SwiftData @Model class Trip { var name: String var destination: String var startDate: Date var endDate: Date var accommodation: Accommodation? } Customize persistence behavior # @Attribute @Attribute(.unique) var name: String @Relationship @Relationship(.cascade) var accommodation: Accommodation? @Transient temporary data that doesn’t need saving. @Transient var destinationWeather = Weather.current() Configure Container # ModelContainer ModelConfiguration Save Model for later use # ModelContext import SwiftUI import SwiftData struct ContentView: View { @Environment(\.

item.title: Foundation
item.description: Preference # App-Specific Data # class UserDefaults An interface to the user’s defaults database, where you store key-value pairs persistently across launches of your app. UserDefaults 使用 Shared Data # class NSUbiquitousKeyValueStore An iCloud-based container of key-value pairs you use to share data among instances of your app running on a user’s connected devices.

item.title: 又看了下 SwiftUI
item.description: 夏天消化慢，最近跑了几趟医院，做了 CT 和无痛胃镜，好在问题不大，又需要养一养了。身体一旦出问题，其他事情的优先级瞬间都要往后排。 Button (isSet ? "Pause" : "Play") { isSet.toggle() } Button (action: {isSet.toggle()}) { Text(isSet ? "Pause" : "Play") } Button { isSet.toggle() } label: { Text(isSet ? "Pause" : "Play") } 同样的功能，

item.title: SwiftUI
item.description: 文档 # SwiftUI | Apple Developer Documentation 基础概念 # Layout fundamentals 声明式语法 # 1. 不透明的返回值类型 # 2. 省略 return # 3. 尾随闭包 # 4. function builder # 举例来说，vstack 定义： init(alignment: HorizontalAlignment = .center, spacing: CGFloat? = nil, content: () -> Content) vstack 使用： struct PracticeView: View { var body: some View { VStack{ Text("HELLO") Text("hello") } } } 数据状态（Mod
